etymology.description: ŚĄč(ŚĄč) (dńĀn, "to carry on the shoulder") is a variant form of śďĒ(śďĒ) (dńĀn, "to carry by hand") -> semantic śČĆ(śČĆ) (sh«íu, "hand") + phonetic Ť©Ļ(Ť©Ļ) (zhńĀn)
etymology.interpretation: ŚĄč(ŚĄč) retains the meaning related to carrying, with a focus on the act of bearing a load on the shoulder, while deriving its phonetic aspect from Ť©Ļ(Ť©Ļ) (zhńĀn, "to carry by hand").
